en: Ain't takin' no attention tonight, but I'm feelin' so high
Show my tan lines, low-rise rooftop
Now it's golden hour all the time
It's a midnight sun, kissin' under the red sky Layin' on your chest like this
Hold me like the pebbles in your hand
ko: 네 손 안의 조약돌처럼 나를 안아줘

en: Initials in the sand, yeah, summer isn't over yet
Skinny dipper with your heart out It's my favorite part now, we ain't gotta tell no one
